episodes.title: 🌈 The Gay Rulebook We Never Received | S2 Ep26
episodes.label: S2 Ep26 · July 17, 2026
episodes.summary: This week we're diving into The Gay Rulebook We Never Received — the completely unofficial handbook that apparently every gay person got except us. After…
episodes.description: This week we're diving into The Gay Rulebook We Never Received — the completely unofficial handbook that apparently every gay person got except us. After a listener asked if they've broken a gay rule by never watching RuPaul's Drag Race , we started wondering: is there actually a list of rules we're all supposed to know? From gym culture and drag shows to Palm Springs, circuit parties, fashion, hookups, and stereotypes, we're unpacking the gay expectations we never signed up for. We also talk about selling the Out at the Fair trailer, saying goodbye to a huge chapter of our lives, whether Caleb should grow a skullet, and why body hair deserves a little more respect. Plus, we answer multiple Throuple Hotline questions from listeners navigating relationships, age gaps, friendship dynamics, and life as a throuple. 📞 Is it a gay crime to never watch RuPaul's Drag Race? 📞 How do you handle judgment as a throuple with a large age gap? 📞 What happens when a potential third starts pulling away? Plus: 🌈 The Gay Rulebook We Never Received 🏳️‍🌈 Gay culture stereotypes 💪 Gym culture & body image 👠 Drag culture & representation 🎧 Circuit parties & Palm Springs 📱 Hookup culture & dating apps 🦴 The Bowl of Chaos ☎️ Throuple Hotline 🔮 Sassy Astrology 😂 Dad Joke of the Week Thank you for spending part of your week with us. Whether you're driving to work, hiding from the summer heat, scrolling through Instagram instead of going to the gym, or wondering if your gay card is still valid, we appreciate every single one of you. 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: ⁠throupletea.com⁠ 📚 Sign up for notifications at ⁠ThroupleTea.com⁠ for your chance to win a signed copy of Tres Amigos, Una Vida: A Throuple Love Story

episodes.title: 🌲 Tahoe, Reno & We Froze Tequila | S2 Ep25
episodes.label: S2 Ep25 · July 10, 2026
episodes.summary: We finally escaped for a much-needed vacation to Lake Tahoe and Reno… and honestly, it was exactly what we needed. This week we’re breaking down our…
episodes.description: We finally escaped for a much-needed vacation to Lake Tahoe and Reno… and honestly, it was exactly what we needed. This week we’re breaking down our entire Tahoe trip, from beautiful hikes and lake days to family time, casino adventures, Lime scooter rides, giant pine trees, and the reason we ended up extending the vacation instead of coming home. We talk about what surprised us most about Tahoe, why Reno felt different this time, our favorite meals, favorite memories, and why this may have been one of the most relaxing trips we’ve taken in years. We also answer a new Throuple Hotline question from a listener in Montreal: 📞 Have any of you ever second-guessed becoming a throuple? 📞 And does Daniel really wear socks during sex? Plus: 🌲 Lake Tahoe adventures 🏡 Airbnb review 🥾 Hiking with Rigsby & Zoey 🎰 Reno recap 👨‍👩‍👧 Family birthday memories 📚 Book 2 update 🎲 Tahoe Bowl of Chaos ☎️ Throuple Hotline 🔮 Sassy Astrology 😂 Dad Joke of the Week Thank you for spending part of your week with us. Whether you’re listening on a road trip, planning your next vacation, hiking a trail, or recovering from your own Fourth of July tequila decisions, we appreciate every single one of you. 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com 📚 Sign up for notifications at ThroupleTea.com for your chance to win a signed copy of Tres Amigos, Una Vida: A Throuple Love Story

episodes.description: ☀️ Episode 24 is here and we’re kicking off summer vacation season!This week we’re talking all things summer including vacations, road trips, beach days, pool life, fireworks disasters, camping stories, and the summer memories that still make us laugh years later.We also answer two new Throuple Hotline questions that immediately turn into chaos:📞 Are you supposed to arrive at 6:00 PM… or leave your house at 6:00 PM?📞 Is making a spreadsheet for vacation normal behavior?We also share some of our favorite travel stories, debate road trips versus flying, talk Fourth of July memories, and somehow end up discussing haunted swimming pools, exploding fireworks, and sex under a pier.Plus:☀️ Summer vacation memories🎆 Fourth of July stories🚗 Road trips vs flying📞 Throuple Hotline🏖️ Beach, lake, pool or AC?🔮 Sassy Astrology😂 Dad Joke of the Week🌽 Garden and corn updatesThank you for spending part of your summer with us. Whether you’re listening by the pool, on vacation, at work, or stuck in traffic like Caleb, we appreciate every single one of you.⸻🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts📲 Instagram: @throupletea🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.label: S2 Ep23 · June 26, 2026
episodes.summary: 🎉 Episode 23 is here and we’re celebrating Daniel’s 40th birthday!This week we look back at the last 15 years together, talk about what has changed (and…
episodes.description: 🎉 Episode 23 is here and we’re celebrating Daniel’s 40th birthday!This week we look back at the last 15 years together, talk about what has changed (and what definitely hasn’t), discuss life lessons, aging, friendship, family, and what we’re most excited about for the future.We also dive into one of our favorite Throuple Hotline questions yet, wrap up Pride Month with a Pride-themed Bowl of Chaos, and share this week’s Sassy Astrology forecast.Plus:✨ Daniel’s 40th birthday questions🎂 Chosen family and life lessons🌈 Pride Month memories📞 A confusing Throuple Hotline situation🔮 Sassy Astrology😂 Dad Joke of the Week🐻 Alaska dreams and future adventuresThank you for joining us on this wild ride. Whether you’re listening from the United States, Canada, the UK, Australia, Vietnam, the Philippines, or anywhere else in the world, we appreciate every single one of you.⸻🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts📲 Instagram: @throupletea🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: How Friendships Change As You Get Older | S2 Ep22
episodes.label: S2 Ep22 · June 19, 2026
episodes.summary: Remember when making friends was as easy as sharing crayons or sitting at the same lunch table? This week, we’re talking about how friendships change as…
episodes.description: Remember when making friends was as easy as sharing crayons or sitting at the same lunch table? This week, we’re talking about how friendships change as you get older. From childhood best friends and high school friend groups to adult friendships that somehow survive years without a text message, we’re diving into what happens when life, careers, relationships, and responsibilities start pulling everyone in different directions. We talk about: 👦 Why making friends felt so easy as kids 🎓 How friendships changed during our teenage years 🏳️‍🌈 How coming out impacted our friendships 📍 Why living in a city like San Diego makes friendships harder to maintain ❤️ The difference between friends, chosen family, and lifelong connections 🤝 Why quality matters more than quantity as you get older 😂 The friendships we’ve lost, kept, and unexpectedly found Plus, we somehow end up discussing social media, sneaking out as teenagers, Summer House drama, Burger King in Hawaii, giant trucks, and why adult friendships require a lot more effort than anyone warns you about. Whether you’re reconnecting with old friends, building a new circle, or wondering where everyone disappeared to after your twenties, this episode is packed with laughs, honesty, and plenty of throuple chaos. If you like conversations about friendship, growing older, chosen family, LGBTQ+ life, relationship dynamics, reality TV tangents, and three gay men oversharing on the internet, you’ll probably enjoy this one. 🌈 Season Segments 👬 Friendship Through the Years 📞 Throuple Hotline 🎲 Bowl of Chaos: Friend Edition 🔮 Sassy Astrology 🤣 Daniel’s Dad Joke Corner ⸻ 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea

episodes.description: What happens when the Bowl of Chaos goes on vacation and leaves us unsupervised?In Episode 21 of A Little Throuple Tea, three gay men in a real-life throuple turn Never Have I Ever into a full episode… and immediately regret it.What starts as a simple drinking game spirals into hookup confessions, relationship crimes, household secrets, Pride Month chaos, Summer House tangents, and one very important question:Does Daniel actually know what an Eiffel Tower is?We talk about:🍹 Never Have I Ever getting messy fast🏳️‍🌈 Pride Month chaos and fair season freedom😂 Daniel’s Eiffel Tower confusion🛏️ Why we do not sleep in the same bed🧦 Daniel sleeping in socks and a shirt🔥 Relationship bickering in real time🌿 Daniel’s Reiki volunteer work🎡 Out at the Fair at the San Diego County FairThis episode is loud, messy, slightly unhinged, and very much what happens when the game takes over the entire show.If you like queer podcasts that mix relationship dynamics, drinking games, chaotic honesty, throuple life, and three gay men arguing about absolutely nothing — this one’s for you.🌈 Season Segments🍹 Never Have I Ever — Full Episode Edition📞 Throuple Hotline🔮 Sassy Astrology😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke Corner⸻🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea🌴 Website: throupletea

episodes.title: A Professional Read Our Birth Charts… and It Explained Our Throuple 😳 | S2 Ep20
episodes.label: S2 Ep20 · June 5, 2026
episodes.summary: Have you ever wondered what would happen if a professional astrologer sat down and analyzed your entire personality? This week, we found out. After…
episodes.description: Have you ever wondered what would happen if a professional astrologer sat down and analyzed your entire personality? This week, we found out. After visiting a spiritual expo in Southern California, Daniel and Will had their birth charts professionally read while Caleb received his first-ever tarot card reading. What started as a fun afternoon quickly turned into a surprisingly accurate deep dive into our personalities, relationships, life paths, and future plans. We talk about: ✨ The personality traits that were spot-on 🔮 Caleb’s tarot reading and the major life changes it revealed 🌙 Daniel’s emotional and spiritual connections 🤯 Why Will’s birth chart completely overwhelmed the astrologer 🏝️ The surprising predictions about our future ❤️ How all three readings seem to explain why our throuple works so well together Plus, we compare our results, roast each other relentlessly, discuss spiritual curiosity, and somehow end up talking about aliens, reality TV, and dogs that can’t handle warm weather. Whether you’re a believer, a skeptic, or just astrology-curious, this episode is full of laughs, unexpected insights, and plenty of throuple chaos. If you like astrology, tarot readings, relationship dynamics, personality tests, spiritual conversations, and three gay men oversharing on the internet, you’ll probably enjoy this one. 🌈 Season Segments 🔮 Professional Birth Chart Readings 🃏 Caleb’s First Tarot Reading ☕ Throuple Tea 🌙 Spiritual Curiosity & Life Changes 🤣 Daniel’s Dad Joke Corner ⸻ 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.description: This episode starts with Vegas…and somehow ends with incest jokes, dragon fruit trauma, and an emotional goodbye to a huge chapter of our lives. 😭 In Episode 19 of A Little Throuple Tea , we talk about: ​Daniel surviving the Wizard of Oz Sphere experience in Vegas 🎰 ​Why sitting FRONT ROW at the Sphere is a terrible idea ​The emotional moment we officially handed off Out at the Fair after 14 years 🌈 ​Being recognized in public for the podcast for the first time 👀 ​Foods we love, foods we hate, and the texture issues ruining our lives ​Mexican food addiction 🌮 ​Why Will thinks dragon fruit tastes like boogers 💀 ​Fast food scams & overpriced California living ​Childhood struggle meals ​Relationship food drama This episode is chaotic, emotional, hilarious, deeply unserious… and somehow also one of the most personal conversations we’ve had about change, burnout, and letting go. episodes.label: S2 Ep18 · May 22, 2026
episodes.summary: One side of the bed got a perfect sleep score…The other side apparently VANISHED for almost 2 hours. 👽 In Episode 18 of A Little Throuple Tea, we spiral…
episodes.description: One side of the bed got a perfect sleep score…The other side apparently VANISHED for almost 2 hours. 👽 In Episode 18 of A Little Throuple Tea, we spiral into one of the weirdest things that’s ever happened to us after Caleb’s Sleep Number data showed he disappeared from bed for 1 hour and 49 minutes — with ZERO memory of it happening.Was it sleepwalking?A glitch?Aliens?Honestly… we’re not ruling anything out. 😭 We also dive into: * Weird sleep habits & night chaos * UFOs, alien theories & paranormal stories * Summer House obsession updates * Birthday chaos for Will 🎂 * Corporate burnout & AI replacing jobs * Hot takes on reality stars in politics * Sassy Astrology for the week * Memorial Day weekend energy & summer plansThis episode is chaotic, emotional, hilarious, slightly unhinged… and somehow one of our favorites yet. episodes.title: We Dated GIRLS Before This… Our Life Before The Throuple | S2 Ep17
episodes.label: S2 Ep17 · May 15, 2026
episodes.summary: Before the throuple, before California, before the chaos… we were just three very different kids growing up in very different worlds. This week, we’re…
episodes.description: Before the throuple, before California, before the chaos… we were just three very different kids growing up in very different worlds. This week, we’re going all the way back — childhood memories, teenage chaos, first jobs, first relationships (yes… even the girl era), and the moments that shaped who we are today. From desert lizard hunting to Midwest lake life… from religious upbringings to party years that probably should’ve gotten us arrested (okay, one of us actually did)… this episode is a full throwback. We also get real about: • Coming out (and not always on your own terms) • Losing friends and finding yourself • The messy path that led us here • And what our younger selves would actually think about our lives now PLUS… the Throuple Hotline is back with: • 🚨 Relationship red flags (or are they?) • 🍽️ The dish debate that almost started a war • 💀 A petty Costco revenge story that… honestly… we respect And of course: 🔮 Sassy Astrology is SERVING this week 😑 Daniel’s dad joke… exists If you’ve ever wondered how three completely different lives somehow collided into one… this is the episode. ⸻ If you like: real-life relationship stories, chaotic humor, LGBTQ+ conversations, and unfiltered life talk — you’re in the right place. ⸻ 🌴 Season Segments: 🎲 Life Before Us 📞 Throuple Hotline 🔮 Sassy Astrology 😑 Dad Joke of the Week ⸻ 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.label: S2 Ep16 · May 8, 2026
episodes.summary: Is it a red flag… or is it just gay? This week on A Little Throuple Tea, we break down the behaviors, habits, and reality TV moments that make people…
episodes.description: Is it a red flag… or is it just gay? This week on A Little Throuple Tea, we break down the behaviors, habits, and reality TV moments that make people ask: Is he toxic? Is he confused? Is he secretly gay? Or is he just moisturized and emotionally available? We talk red flags, gaydar, reality TV men, Summer House chaos, modern masculinity, beauty routines, emotional intelligence, and why some people confuse personality with sexuality. We also get into: 🐓 Angry rain-soaked chickens 🌵 Replacing dead palm trees with giant cactuses 📺 Summer House & Bravo chaos 🔮 Sassy Astrology 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke This episode is funny, chaotic, lightly unhinged, and somehow weirdly insightful. If you’ve ever looked at a man and thought… “something isn’t adding up” — this one’s for you. ⸻ 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: Things Straight People Don’t Understand About Gay Relationships | S2 Ep15
episodes.label: S2 Ep15 · May 1, 2026
episodes.summary: What do straight people always ask gay couples and throuples? This week on A Little Throuple Tea, we break down the funniest, weirdest, most common…
episodes.description: What do straight people always ask gay couples and throuples? This week on A Little Throuple Tea, we break down the funniest, weirdest, most common questions straight people ask about gay relationships. Who’s the girl? Who’s the top? How do holidays work? Do your families know? How does a throuple even work? We talk chosen family, communication, boundaries, stereotypes, why LGBTQ+ spaces matter, and the things people still don’t understand about queer relationships in 2026. It gets chaotic, honest, funny, and a little unhinged… as usual. Also in this episode: 🎲 Bowl of Chaos – Straight People Questions Edition 📺 SMUT TV – LGBTQ+ representation in TV shows 🔮 Sassy Astrology 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke If you’ve ever had to explain your relationship to nosy people… this one’s for you. ⸻ 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: Throuple Takeover: Death Valley (Part 2) — Then Things Got Weird | S2 Ep14
episodes.label: S2 Ep14 · April 24, 2026
episodes.summary: What happened after Death Valley? In this episode, we finish our Death Valley road trip and break down everything from our final stops in the park to the…
episodes.description: What happened after Death Valley? In this episode, we finish our Death Valley road trip and break down everything from our final stops in the park to the total chaos of getting home. In Episode 14 of A Little Throuple Tea , we pick up where Part 1 left off — this time from home — recapping how the trip ended, what stood out most, and why the ride back somehow became its own adventure. This is Part 2 of our Death Valley trip, where we talk about the final stretch of the park, the weird roadside stops, the EV charging drama, and the moments that made the last day just as memorable as the first. On the final day and drive home, we explored: • Badwater Basin • Devil’s Golf Course • Dante’s View • Artist’s Palette • Harmony Borax Works • Death Valley Junction • Area 51 Alien Center • Baker • Victorville We talk about what it felt like standing below sea level, the surreal views from Dante’s View, the strange beauty of the salt flats, and why Death Valley feels so much bigger and weirder in real life than it ever does in photos. We also get into what it was like finishing the trip in an EV — from packed charging stations and range anxiety to the shady chargers in Victorville that nearly became their own subplot. And because this is still us, we somehow also end up talking about Reiki, dental hygienists, Bravo drama, alien probing, and Daniel’s ongoing dad joke collapse. This episode is less about the postcard version of travel and more about what actually happens once the plan starts unraveling. Because sometimes the best part of a trip… is the part you never planned for. If you like travel podcasts, national park trips, roadside chaos, and real-life storytelling with a very gay twist — this one’s for you. 🔥 Episode Segments 🎲 Chaos Bowl 🔮 Sassy Astrology — Weekly Card Pull 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke ⸻ 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: Throuple Takeover: Death Valley (Part 1) — Not What We Expected | S2 Ep13
episodes.label: S2 Ep13 · April 17, 2026
episodes.summary: What is Death Valley actually like? In Episode 13 of A Little Throuple Tea , we take the podcast on the road — recording from our hotel room in Stovepipe…
episodes.description: What is Death Valley actually like? In Episode 13 of A Little Throuple Tea , we take the podcast on the road — recording from our hotel room in Stovepipe Wells Village after the first few days of our trip. This is Part 1 of our Death Valley series, where we break down everything we’ve experienced so far, what surprised us, and what the desert is actually like beyond the photos. Over the first three days, we explored: • Ubehebe Crater • Titus Canyon • Stovepipe Wells • Hell’s Gate • Rhyolite (ghost town) • Beatty (actual town… kind of) • Mesquite Flat Sand Dunes • Stovepipe Wells Village We talk about the drive out, the scale of the landscape, what felt surreal, what felt underwhelming, and the moments that made the trip worth it. We also get into what it was like doing this as our first EV road trip — from finding chargers to cost compared to gas and how it actually felt navigating a national park this way. This episode is less polished and more in-the-moment — just us in a hotel room, recapping the experience as it’s happening. Because sometimes the best stories aren’t planned. They’re lived. If you like travel podcasts, real-life storytelling, and chaotic commentary from three gay men figuring it out as they go — this one’s for you. 🔥 Season Segments 🔮 Sassy Astrology — Weekly Card Pull ⸻ 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: What We Don’t Post Online (The Truth About Our Relationship) | S2 Ep12
episodes.label: S2 Ep12 · April 10, 2026
episodes.summary: You see what we post. But you don’t see everything. In Episode 12 of A Little Throuple Tea , we talk about the parts of our life that stay off the…
episodes.description: You see what we post. But you don’t see everything. In Episode 12 of A Little Throuple Tea , we talk about the parts of our life that stay off the internet — not because we’re hiding anything, but because some things are meant to be protected. This isn’t drama. This isn’t exposing each other. This is about boundaries. We get honest about: • The fights you don’t see — and why conflict isn’t content • The “boring” days that never get posted • The boundaries we’ve set around what stays private • The biggest misconceptions people have based on what we share • The things we actively protect to keep our relationship strong Because just because something is public… doesn’t mean it’s available. We talk about what it means to share your life online while still protecting your relationship, your peace, and each other’s dignity. And why transparency is not the same as access. If you like queer podcasts that mix real-life perspective, relationships, boundaries, and honest conversations about modern life — this one’s for you. 🔥 Season Segments 🎲 Chaos Bowl — Truth or Sip (Social Media Edition) 📺 SMUT TV — Traitors 🔮 Sassy Astrology — Weekly Card Pull 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke — Tradition matters ⸻ 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: Gay Men & Aging: What Changes in Your 20s, 30s & 40s (No One Talks About This) | S2 Ep11
episodes.label: S2 Ep11 · April 3, 2026
episodes.summary: Gay culture loves youth. But what happens when you’re not 25 anymore? In Episode 11 of A Little Throuple Tea , we have an honest conversation about aging…
episodes.description: Gay culture loves youth. But what happens when you’re not 25 anymore? In Episode 11 of A Little Throuple Tea , we have an honest conversation about aging as gay men — what changes, what gets better, and what people don’t talk about enough. This isn’t a rant. This isn’t anti-young people. This is just a real conversation about how life shifts through your 20s, 30s, and 40s — especially in a culture that often prioritizes youth, attention, and appearance. We talk about: • The pressure of youth in gay culture • Body standards and social media comparison • The shift from chasing attention to choosing alignment • How dating, friendships, and priorities evolve • Why peace starts to feel more attractive than attention We also break down the differences between each stage of life — from the chaos of your 20s, to the clarity of your 30s, to the confidence and stability that comes with your 40s. Because aging isn’t losing value. It’s losing insecurity. We also get honest about what still feels uncertain — from changing bodies to relevance to maintaining community — because growth doesn’t mean you stop being human. If you like queer podcasts that mix real-life perspective, relationship dynamics, personal growth, and honest conversations about modern gay life — this one’s for you. 🔥 Season Segments 🎲 Chaos Bowl — Rank It (Aging Edition) 📺 SMUT TV — Dinosaurs (Netflix) 🔮 Sassy Astrology — Weekly Card Pull 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke — Tradition matters ⸻ 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: He Hasn’t Seen THESE Movies?! (We Were Shocked) | S2 Ep10
episodes.label: S2 Ep10 · March 27, 2026
episodes.summary: How do you go through life… and not see these movies? In Episode 10 of A Little Throuple Tea , we put Daniel on the spot and run through the ultimate…
episodes.description: How do you go through life… and not see these movies? In Episode 10 of A Little Throuple Tea , we put Daniel on the spot and run through the ultimate list of movies everyone assumes you’ve seen — and quickly realize… he has missed A LOT. From classic 90s blockbusters to iconic comedies, cultural staples, and the entire gay movie canon, this episode turns into a full-on roast, reaction, and chaotic movie breakdown. We go through: • The movies everyone has seen (or should have) • The gay culture canon — the ones that are basically required viewing • Iconic movies everyone quotes (even if they haven’t seen them) • LGBTQ films that actually matter • The “shock test” movies that trigger the biggest reactions And yes… it gets worse the deeper we go. At some point it stops being a movie list and starts becoming Daniel’s cultural education. Because how do you exist in the 90s without absorbing some of these by accident? We also play a round of “Daniel Explains the Plot,” where he tries to guess movies he’s never seen — and it goes exactly how you think it will. If you like queer podcasts that mix pop culture, chaos, nostalgia, and roasting your friends — this episode is for you. 🔥 Season Segments 🎲 Chaos Bowl — Movie Edition 🔮 Sassy Astrology — Weekly Card Pull 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke — Tradition matters ⸻ 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: What 10 Years Together Actually Looks Like (Not What You Think) | S2 Ep9
episodes.label: S2 Ep9 · March 20, 2026
episodes.summary: What does 10 years of love actually look like? Not the highlight reel. Not the fantasy. The real version. In Episode 9 of A Little Throuple Tea , we talk…
episodes.description: What does 10 years of love actually look like? Not the highlight reel. Not the fantasy. The real version. In Episode 9 of A Little Throuple Tea , we talk about what long-term love actually becomes after the early excitement fades — and why that’s not a bad thing. We break down the difference between what people think a throuple relationship looks like versus what it actually takes to maintain one for a decade. From the hard years filled with growth, ego clashes, and outside pressure… to the quieter, “boring” seasons built on routine, stability, and showing up for each other — this episode is honest, grounded, and real. Because long-term love isn’t built on constant excitement. It’s built on decisions. We talk about what almost broke us, what made us stronger, and why choosing each other over and over again is what actually keeps a relationship going. And why the “boring” parts might be the most important ones. If you like queer podcasts that mix real relationship dynamics, long-term partnership, emotional growth, and honest conversations — this one’s for you. 🔥 Season Segments 🎲 Chaos Bowl — Sip If… 📺 SMUT TV — Next Level Chef 🔮 Sassy Astrology — Weekly Card Pull 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke — Tradition matters ⸻ 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: Which Golden Girl Are We? Dorothy, Blanche, Rose or Sophia… The Results Surprised Us | S2 Ep8
episodes.label: S2 Ep8 · March 13, 2026
episodes.summary: Every friend group has Golden Girl energy… the real question is which one you actually are. In Episode 8 of A Little Throuple Tea , we attempt to figure…
episodes.description: Every friend group has Golden Girl energy… the real question is which one you actually are. In Episode 8 of A Little Throuple Tea , we attempt to figure out which Golden Girl each of us truly is — and quickly realize you don’t get to assign your own character. Your friends do. We break down the personalities of Dorothy, Blanche, Rose, and Sophia, argue about which one we think we are, and reveal what those choices say about our relationship dynamic as a real-life throuple. Along the way we talk about why The Golden Girls became such a cultural staple for gay audiences, the power of chosen family, and why the show still resonates decades later. And yes… the results get chaotic. Plus we recap the latest Vanderpump Rules drama, pull the weekly cards during Sassy Astrology, bring back the Chaos Bowl, and close the episode with Daniel’s infamous Dad Joke. Oh — and stick around to the end. We drop a big announcement you won’t want to miss. If you like queer podcasts that mix pop culture, relationship dynamics, nostalgia, and chaotic honesty — this episode is for you. 🔥 Season Segments 🎲 Chaos Bowl — Golden Girls Edition 📺 SMUT TV — Vanderpump Rules 🔮 Sassy Astrology — Weekly Card Pull 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke ⸻ 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: Tres Amigos, Una Vida: What’s Real, What’s Fiction & The Story Behind the Book | S2 Ep7
episodes.label: S2 Ep7 · March 6, 2026
episodes.summary: Is Tres Amigos, Una Vida a true story… or fiction? In Episode 7 of A Little Throuple Tea , we finally unpack the question we get asked constantly: How…
episodes.description: Is Tres Amigos, Una Vida a true story… or fiction? In Episode 7 of A Little Throuple Tea , we finally unpack the question we get asked constantly: How much of the book is real? This episode goes deeper than the surface. We talk about why we wrote the book in the first place, what parts of our real lives inspired it, what was changed for storytelling, and why the ending of Book One was never meant to be the end. Because Tres Amigos, Una Vida was never designed as a single story — it’s the beginning of a much bigger universe. We break down the emotional truths inside the book, the choices we made as storytellers, and what’s coming next as the series continues. And yes… we also tease Book Two , which arrives June 2026 . If you’ve ever wondered what’s real, what’s fictionalized, and why we chose to tell our story this way — this episode is the answer. If you like queer podcasts that mix relationship dynamics, storytelling, behind-the-scenes creative process, and a little chaos — this one’s for you. 🔥 Season Segments 🎲 Chaos Bowl — Taste Roulette Returns 📺 SMUT TV — Vanderpump Rules (Stassi’s 30th Birthday Episode) 🔮 Sassy Astrology — Weekly Card Pull & Cosmic Check-In 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke — Tradition must continue ⸻ 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: We Met Another Throuple… And It Traumatized Us | S2 Ep6
episodes.label: S2 Ep6 · February 27, 2026
episodes.summary: In Episode 6 of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple share the story of the one and only time they met another throuple in the…
episodes.description: In Episode 6 of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple share the story of the one and only time they met another throuple in the wild — and why it completely changed how they see relationship dynamics. No names. No timelines. No identifying details. This isn’t gossip. It’s a cautionary tale. From subtle red flags to a power dynamic that felt… off, this episode unpacks the moment we realized that not every throuple is healthy just because it’s three. We talk escalation. We talk boundaries. We talk about the feeling in your gut when something isn’t safe — even if you can’t explain why yet. And most importantly: What healthy actually looks like. If you like queer podcasts that mix real relationship transparency, cultural commentary, and controlled chaos — this one hits different. ⸻ 🔥 Season 2 Segments 🎲 Chaos Bowl — Rank It (Competitive Energy Activated) 📺 SMUT TV — Traitors Season 1 breakdown 🔮 Sassy Astrology — weekly tarot + zodiac reset 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke — unfortunately still happening ⸻ 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: Sassy Palm Reading Queen | S2 Ep5
episodes.label: S2 Ep5 · February 20, 2026
episodes.summary: Can your hands expose your entire relationship dynamic? In Episode 5 of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple let the Sassy Palm…
episodes.description: Can your hands expose your entire relationship dynamic? In Episode 5 of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple let the Sassy Palm Reading Queen take over and read what’s written in their actual palms. Heart lines. Head lines. Life lines. Fate lines. Who loves the hardest? Who overthinks the most? Who’s built for longevity? And somehow… why does it all feel accurate? It’s camp. It’s chaotic. It’s mildly spiritual. And it was recorded on Valentine’s Day — so the energy was festive. We break down what each palm says individually — and then what those lines reveal about how the three of us actually function together. No crystal balls. No dramatic predictions. Just hands, personality, and a little drag energy. If you like queer podcasts that mix relationship dynamics, personality deep dives, and chaotic honesty — this one’s for you. 🔥 Season 2 Segments 🎲 Chaos Bowl — Truth or Sip (Feral Edition) 📺 SMUT TV — one moment, one hot take, one verdict 🔮 Sassy Astrology — weekly tarot + zodiac reset 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke — tradition matters 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: Is Everything Weird Now or Is It Just Us? | S2 Ep4
episodes.label: S2 Ep4 · February 13, 2026
episodes.summary: Is it just us… or did everyone collectively lose the plot? In Episode 4 of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple clock the chaos…
episodes.description: Is it just us… or did everyone collectively lose the plot? In Episode 4 of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple clock the chaos of modern life and ask the real question: Are things actually weird now, or are we just tired? From social norms that make zero sense to internet behavior that feels fully unhinged, this episode is rapid-fire, observational, and slightly unhinged (in a controlled way). No fixing. No solutions. Just noticing, laughing, and moving on. If you like queer podcasts that mix relationship dynamics, cultural commentary, and chaotic honesty — this one’s for you. 🔥 Season 2 Segments 🎲 Chaos Bowl — Would You Rather (Messy Edition) 📺 SMUT TV — one moment, one hot take, one verdict 🔮 Sassy Astrology — weekly tarot + zodiac reset 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke — tradition matters 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: Aliens, Other Dimensions & Sh*t We Can’t See | S2 Ep3
episodes.label: S2 Ep3 · February 6, 2026
episodes.summary: In this episode of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple lean into curiosity, conspiracy-adjacent questions, and the kind of…
episodes.description: In this episode of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple lean into curiosity, conspiracy-adjacent questions, and the kind of topics people love to side-eye but secretly think about anyway. We’re talking aliens, other dimensions, parallel timelines, déjà vu, and things we can’t quite explain — not as experts or truth-tellers, but as three very curious people asking, “Okay but… what if?” No preaching. No tin foil hats. Just humor, curiosity, and a lot of unanswered questions. We get into: • Why aliens feel less wild than half the things humans do • Why government vagueness gives suspicious energy • Whether extraterrestrials would even bother with Earth • The “something shifted around 2012” theory • Glitches, weird vibes, and those “that felt off” moments Are we saying it’s real? No. Are we saying it’s interesting? Absolutely. Is this the Matrix? We’re not ruling it out. 🔥 Season 2 Segments: 🎲 Chaos Bowl — Taste Test Roulette 📺 SMUT TV — Beast Games Episodes 5 & 6 verdict 🔮 Sassy Astrology — weekly tarot + zodiac reset 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.description: In this episode of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple answer listener-submitted questions that challenge assumptions, test boundaries, and spark honest conversations about visibility, relationships, and public perception. Some questions made us laugh. Some made us pause. And a few reminded us why we don’t answer everything. If you’re into LGBTQ podcasts, throuple dynamics, poly relationship conversations, and chaotic-but-real Q&A episodes — this one gets honest fast. Season 2 segments return: 🎲 The Chaos Bowl — loud, fast, unfiltered 📺 SMUT TV — our verdict on Beast Games 🔮 Sassy Astrology — weekly tarot + zodiac reset 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke — unfortunately This episode keeps setting the tone for Season 2: tighter segments, more chemistry, and conversations that don’t tiptoe around the real stuff. 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.description: Season 2 starts here — and Season 1 changed everything. In this episode of A Little Throuple Tea , three gay men in a real-life throuple break down what actually happened behind the scenes of Season 1: what popped off, what feedback hit harder than expected, what boundaries we learned the hard way, and why Season 2 had to feel different. If you’re into LGBTQ podcasts, gay relationship dynamics, poly/throuple conversations, and chaotic but honest storytelling — this is the reset episode. We talk: • What surprised us most about Season 1 • What we underestimated once people really started listening • What feedback stuck • What we’re not doing again in Season 2 • What we’re building differently this time New Season 2 segments: 🎲 The Chaos Bowl — loud, fast, unfiltered 🔮 Sassy Astrology — tarot + zodiac without horoscope app energy 📺 SMUT TV — tight verdict-only reality TV takes 😑 Daniel’s Dad Joke — unfortunately Whether you’re new or coming back, this is the tone shift. Season 2 is tighter, messier, more intentional — and just getting started. 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.title: Gay Bar Culture, DJ Drama & Season 1 Finale | Gay Throuple Podcast | S1 Ep10
episodes.label: S1 Ep10 · November 21, 2025
episodes.summary: It’s the Season 1 Finale, and we’re going out the only way we know how — loud, messy, and reminiscing about the golden age of gay bars. 🌈 In Episode 10,…
episodes.description: It’s the Season 1 Finale, and we’re going out the only way we know how — loud, messy, and reminiscing about the golden age of gay bars. 🌈 In Episode 10, we’re diving into gay bar culture from 2006–2009, the chaos before smartphones changed nightlife, and Will’s 15 years behind the DJ booth watching it all go down. From dance floor disasters to who actually survived a Sunday Funday… we lived through it and somehow came out functional. 😂 As a committed gay throuple, we’re also wrapping up Season 1 — the highs, the chaos, the inside jokes, and everything we didn’t plan but absolutely talked about anyway. If you’re into LGBTQ relationship podcasts, real-life throuple dynamics, and honest conversations about modern gay culture, this one’s for you. Plus our final round of Smut TV and Social Tea to close out the season. Thank you for hanging with us through our first season. Season 2 is coming — and trust us, it’s only getting wilder. 💅 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.description: In Episode 9 of A Little Throuple Tea , we’re breaking down how we actually manage money as a gay throuple — from budgeting three incomes into one household to figuring out who saves, who spends, and who absolutely cannot be trusted at Costco. 💸 We talk real-life TINK (Two Income, No Kids… plus one more 😏) finances, impulse spending, shared accounts, and how money dynamics affect relationships in a committed polyamorous triad. Plus: 📺 Weekly Smut TV chaos 🍵 Social Tea 🎲 A rapid-fire game that exposes way too much Somehow this episode is financially responsible and completely unhinged. 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.summary: Mercury’s in retrograde, emotions are in chaos, and apparently… don’t trust a unicorn. 💅 In this episode of our gay throuple podcast, we’re diving deep…
episodes.description: Mercury’s in retrograde, emotions are in chaos, and apparently… don’t trust a unicorn. 💅 In this episode of our gay throuple podcast, we’re diving deep into birth charts, astrology, and how the stars might actually explain our personalities — and our LGBTQ relationship drama. Daniel breaks down rising signs, sun and moon placements, and why he’s convinced the universe predicted this throuple. From love languages to reality TV smut, this one is equal parts cosmic and chaotic. We debate which planet keeps messing with our Wi-Fi (spoiler: it’s always Mercury), whether astrology can predict compatibility in a polyamorous relationship, and why Will almost peed from laughing during this episode. 😂 If you’ve ever wondered how astrology affects relationships — especially in a three-person partnership — this one’s for you. 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.description: Happy Halloween! 👻 This week on our gay throuple podcast, we’re diving into hustle culture — queer style. In Episode 7 of A Little Throuple Tea , we talk about how we built a full-blown LGBTQ lifestyle brand from chaos. From Out at the Fair to books, podcasts, plants, cookies, and content creation, we break down how three gay men turned side hustles into a throuple-powered empire. Plus: spooky publishing horror stories, haunted movie debates, and which one of us definitely dies first in a scary film. Trick or treat — this throuple came to slay. 🎃 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

episodes.description: Episode 6 is here! When three gay guys move in together, apparently it’s not just a house — it’s an “orgy mansion.” 🙄 From awkward first impressions to Pride flag drama, loud labels, and nosy neighbors, we’re spilling all the neighborhood tea. Who thought we were “just roommates”? Who called us the loudest house on the block? And which neighbor interaction had us laughing (and cringing) the most? Plus, we’re answering fake “viewer questions” until you send us real ones for Season 2 at ThroupleTea.com. episodes.description: Episode 5 is here — and yes, it might be haunted. 👻 Most couples argue about bills. We argue about the ghost in the hallway. From house-hunting chaos as a throuple to flickering lights, creaky floors, and full paranormal vibes, we’re spilling all the spooky tea. In this episode: • Our haunted house experiences • Who’s the biggest scaredy cat • Who would actually invite the ghost to brunch • A listener Q about ghosting (in dating, not the attic) • Our take on finding real connection in a world that loves to fetishize Whether you believe in ghosts or not, this one gets messy, funny, and unexpectedly deep. 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea 🌴 Website: throupletea.com

We spill: • Who overpacks and who forgets everything • What it’s really like booking hotels as a three-person relationship • Awkward travel moments • Our favorite destinations • The trip drama that almost broke us (but makes us laugh now) Traveling in a committed polyamorous relationship isn’t always smooth — and this throuple definitely doesn’t do layovers quietly. 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea Website: throupletea.com

episodes.description: We didn’t plan on becoming gay chicken farmers… but somehow our throuple life now includes backyard chickens, dogs, gardens, and pure chaos. 🐓😂 In Episode 3 of A Little Throuple Tea , we share our funniest chicken stories, talk about the shift from city jobs and fairgrounds to farm vibes, and break down this week’s Smut TV segment. From eggs to Etsy, this is real-life gay throuple energy — messy, hilarious, and unexpectedly wholesome. If you’ve ever wondered what a 3-person relationship looks like outside the city… buckle up. 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 📲 Follow: @throupletea 🌐 throupletea.com

This week, we’re answering your questions about our real-life gay throuple relationship — how we make a 3-person relationship work, boundaries, jealousy, dating, and what polyamory actually looks like behind the scenes. We also catch up on life updates and dive into our weekly Smut TV segment (yes… we went there). Heads up — this one’s a long ride (just over an hour), so buckle up. It’s messy, it’s honest, and it’s basically like hanging out on the couch with your favorite chaotic gay throuple. If you’re curious about polyamory, throuple dynamics, LGBTQ relationships, or how three committed partners navigate real life together — this episode is for you. 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts Follow us on Instagram: @throupletea Website: https://throupletea.com

From messy beginnings to building a stable partnership, nothing is off limits. We dive into: • How we met • Navigating jealousy & communication • What people get wrong about throuples • Life as an LGBTQ+ non-traditional relationship If you’ve ever wondered how a gay throuple works, this is where it starts. 🎧 Full video on Spotify & YouTube 🎙️ Audio everywhere you stream podcasts 👉 ThroupleTea.com
